default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' 'sha256-J1QHVAri1VFjAOQCfOmU4cl/lY1GThN9D/8RbXrPDyQ=' https://static.cloudflareinsights.com https://cloudflareinsights.com; script-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://static.cloudflareinsights.com https://cloudflareinsights.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://r2cdn.perplexity.ai; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: https://*.supabase.co https://*.supabase.in https://gnambaservices.ci; connect-src 'self' https://thykrnoqgylrbfupophs.supabase.co wss://thykrnoqgylrbfupophs.supabase.co https://thykrnoqgylrbfupophs.supabase.co https://cloudflareinsights.com https://static.cloudflareinsights.com https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com http://localhost:11434; frame-src 'self' https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://www.youtube.com; media-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests; "> Gnamba Services - BTP, Immobilier & Foncier
